nodes.norm_label: oom policy: 3 crashes in 10 min → stop daemon + notify user + notify owner

nodes.norm_label: scripts/monitoring/*: docker stats every minute, 60-point history, alert if avg >70% for 1hr

nodes.label: ROADMAP: Claude Code Features for Proboi bot (5 features)
nodes.norm_label: roadmap: claude code features for proboi bot (5 features)

nodes.label: Feature 1: Plan Mode — pre-execution plan with PLAN_START/PLAN_END markers and confirm/cancel/clarify buttons
nodes.norm_label: feature 1: plan mode — pre-execution plan with plan_start/plan_end markers and confirm/cancel/clarify buttons

nodes.label: Feature 2: Todo-list — live progress tracking with TODO_LIST_START/TODO_ITEM/TODO_START/TODO_DONE markers
nodes.norm_label: feature 2: todo-list — live progress tracking with todo_list_start/todo_item/todo_start/todo_done markers

nodes.label: Feature 3: Context compaction — auto-summarize old messages when approaching token limit
nodes.norm_label: feature 3: context compaction — auto-summarize old messages when approaching token limit

nodes.label: Feature 4: Guest memory — persistent session summaries in /opt/vault/{userId}/memory/
nodes.norm_label: feature 4: guest memory — persistent session summaries in /opt/vault/{userid}/memory/

nodes.label: Feature 5: Redirect interrupt — !<text> aborts current execution and relaunches with new instruction
nodes.norm_label: feature 5: redirect interrupt — !<text> aborts current execution and relaunches with new instruction

nodes.label: Plan Mode: AbortController stops stream after PLAN_END, plan stored in pendingPlan
nodes.norm_label: plan mode: abortcontroller stops stream after plan_end, plan stored in pendingplan

nodes.label: StreamingState extended: todoMessageId + todoItems array with pending/in_progress/done
nodes.norm_label: streamingstate extended: todomessageid + todoitems array with pending/in_progress/done

nodes.norm_label: parsetodomarkers(chunk, state): parses todo_list_start/todo_start/todo_done in stream

nodes.norm_label: estimatecontextsize(): reads sessionfile, counts json bytes, approximates tokens

nodes.label: compactSession(): summarizes old messages via LLM, replaces with summary block, rewrites sessionFile
nodes.norm_label: compactsession(): summarizes old messages via llm, replaces with summary block, rewrites sessionfile

nodes.label: buildSummaryPrompt(): prompt for summarizing dialog history, max 2000 words
nodes.norm_label: buildsummaryprompt(): prompt for summarizing dialog history, max 2000 words

nodes.label: Guest memory structure: /opt/vault/{userId}/memory/ with index.json, sessions/, facts.json, MEMORY.md
nodes.norm_label: guest memory structure: /opt/vault/{userid}/memory/ with index.json, sessions/, facts.json, memory.md

nodes.norm_label: savesessionmemory(): called on session end, generates summary, appends to day file, rebuilds memory.md

nodes.norm_label: injectmemorycontext(): reads memory.md, injects as first system message if >50 chars

nodes.label: rebuildMemoryMd(): builds readable MEMORY.md from last 14 days sessions + facts, max 50KB
nodes.norm_label: rebuildmemorymd(): builds readable memory.md from last 14 days sessions + facts, max 50kb
